programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Duke talks Gomer into taking a jeep to the airport.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls his and Laura's attempts to get married when Ritchie brings up the subject.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob is puzzled when he discovers Laura's secret bank account.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob doesn't know what he's in for when he invites Buddy's charming, pool hustling brother over for a friendly game of billiards.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A hypnotist visits a Petrie dinner party where Rob accidentally picks up a post-hypnotic suggestion.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob has some explaining to do when son Ritchie learns that his middle name is Rosebud.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Ric Vallone guest stars on 'The Alan Brady Show,' Rob grows increasingly concerned that Sally is falling for the star.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura recount vastly different versions of a marital spat that sends Rob storming out of the house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob suspects that Buddy and Sally may be moonlighting for another comedy show or having an affair.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Blanche tells Oscar she is remarrying and invites him and Felix to the wedding.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix talks Oscar into being a big brother to Mike, a young boy in a reform school.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar hires Felix to cover an international wrestling match and is thrown for a fall by subsequent developments.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix's grandfather, tossed out by his wife because of his insane jealousy, arrives at his grandson's apartment.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix invests his and Oscar's money in Mr. Wing's Japanese restaurant.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix turns psychic in the Psychic, Shymcic episode of The Odd Couple. Invoking his ESP Felix warns a skeptical Oscar not to attend a gala dinner at which he is to be named sportswriter of the year. But Oscar ignores the danger awaiting him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: At a get-together arranged by Felix, Oscar and Blanche compare notes on-the New Year's Eve Party that led to their divorce.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: In The Princess, Miss Simmons plays Lydia of Lichtenstein who visits Felix's studio for a portrait sitting and meets Oscar, who, unaware of her station, tries to date her.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver, Lisa and Eb travel to Chicago with Arnold to prove the pig is the rightful heir to the Birnbacher pork empire. Will this pig get rich? Arnold makes a surprising prediction that baffles all, including all the lawyers involved.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Tip Ellis, a fellow private investigator and friend of Joe Mannix, is murdered while looking into a case of industrial espionage in Fresno.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to help a nun who took a dying man's confession that he let an innocent man go to prison for murder, but finds the inmate insisting he is guilty.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Fellow private investigator Charlie Frome is killed by a hit-and-run driver, apparently while working on a case, and Joe Mannix decides to see if he can determine why Frome was murdered.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: An executive hires Mannix with the intent of having him killed upon recovering some stolen computer plans, because of a letter contained with them that incriminates him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired by a woman from Cleveland named Marcia Inman to locate her missing husband. Mannix investigates her husband's business contacts and follows a man matching his description after the man leaves what appears to be his mistress' apartment.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Someone tries to kill Ken Mitchell, the head of a toy-making firm. Not wanting a violent incident to be associated with a toy business, Mitchell instead hires Joe Mannix to find out who might have tried to kill him.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Investigating a young woman's death, Stone ends up saving another from murder at the hands of the same mentally-unbalanced man.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone sets out to discover why a young detective seems to be absolutely convinced of a murder suspect's guilt for no apparent reason.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone appears to be the only one willing to give the benefit of the doubt to a convict who is accused of a murder while out of prison on a 36-hour pass.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a corner newspaper vendor goes after the muggers who stole his life savings, Stone and Keller discover that the crime is linked to the murder of a housing commissioner.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The murders of a flight attendant and a nurse who were rooming together lead Stone and Keller to suspect a jewelry salesman and his wife.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In their attempt to bring down a family of con artists who victimize entire neighborhoods, Stone and Keller are aided by dissension among the gang members.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: Snow White with the Red Hair

programme.title: Snow White with the Red Hair

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Uno para llevar
programme.desc: Una pareja casada decidió escapar del frío del invierno con unas minivacaciones en Key West.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1980, Shannon Mohr, residente de Michigan, murió en lo que su nuevo esposo, David Davis, reportó que fue un accidente al montar a caballo. Después de su muerte, la familia de Shannon informó que Davis parecía estar lejos de estar agobiado por el dolor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un auto en una zanja de drenaje con dos cuerpos adentro, una punta de un dedo de un guante de látex encontrada en la escena del crimen apuntaría a los investigadores hacia el asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Bloqueo del escritor
programme.desc: Una brillante joven arquitecta se enfermó y murió poco antes de testificar en un juicio penal. La autopsia reveló que había sido envenenada con arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Destination Wild: Indochina's Wild Heart

programme.desc: A serial killer, released from prison, disappears; someone is stalking Antonio.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia, Sebastián y los gemelos llegan a la finca para pasar el día, pero los impulsos juegan en su contra y todo se complica. Justino le da una sorpresa a Perfecta y le hace una promesa.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no sabe lo peligrosa que puede ser Valeria, Blasina escucha sus amenazas y entiende la gravedad de lo que sucede. Iluminada y Dimas también mueren de celos al ver a Panterita.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta conoce los detalles del secuestro de su hijo Amador, no puede creer lo que le dice Laurentino. Alicia pregunta por Panterita, cuando se comenta quién tiene una relación con ella.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Iris le ofrece a Griselda convertirla en una mujer refinada, pero ella la rechaza al descubrir que es tía de su rival. Teresa Cristina se desmaya cuando ve por televisión la noticia del premio. Bárbara planea tomar parte de la fortuna de Griselda.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo y Gabriel invitan a cenar a Griselda al mismo tiempo. Ella acepta ir al Gourmet Palmer con los dos. Amalia la ayuda a vestirse y a maquillarse y Griselda luce radiante. Juan Pablo y Esther vuelven a discutir sobre el embarazo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina llega al Gourmet Palmer y enfrenta a Griselda, quien esta vez se defiende y se va con la frente en alto. Reinaldo está dolido y decepcionado por la actitud de su esposa, discuten y le pide a Teresa Cristina que se separen.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Bárbara se aparece en casa de Griselda y exige ver a su hijo Kikito. Griselda la echa, pero en aras de la tranquilidad familiar, le pregunta cuánto dinero quiere para dejar a su nieto en paz. Juan Pablo despierta junto a Marcela y se marcha afectado.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: El bello rostro de Sara está a punto de ser desfigurado. Tito quiere saber si es gay y le pide un beso a Bruno en la primera cita. Cristóbal le ruega a Marisa que le dé una segunda oportunidad y le anuncia a su padre una importante decisión.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal es el nuevo candidato al senado, pero a Tito no le agrada que su jefe pase de exitoso empresario a político. Cristóbal quiere tener el mejor equipo a su lado y solo piensa en Marisa. Sara se da el lujo de humillar a todas las camareras.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Como político, Cristóbal logra su primer objetivo al hablar con Marisa. Tito también apoya el sueño de su jefe, pero descubre un impedimento para su candidatura. A Marisa la ven como una empleada protegida en el hotel y Sara le propone un pacto.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Víctor convence a Marisa de que Cristóbal y Sara son amantes. Estanislao le adelanta al candidato que meterse en Queens no le será tan fácil y Cristóbal enfrenta a Calixta por los negocios. A los Parker les llega una enfermera particular.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta conoce los detalles del secuestro de su hijo Amador, no puede creer lo que le dice Laurentino. Alicia pregunta por Panterita, cuando se comenta quién tiene una relación con ella.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: A pesar de la distancia que Alicia trata de imponer a Sebastián, él le ofrece explicaciones. Perfecta quiere viajar con los niños para mantener vivo el recuerdo de su padre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia piensa que Sebastián es un mentiroso y que es igual a Amador, ella pasa un mal momento cuando alguien solicita trabajo en el hotel. Perfecta tiene los nervios de punta por sus hijos.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will each be suspended from their own crane. Player is placed inside a sealed Plexiglas coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a city bus. On a table, there are dishes of roaches. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside. Contestants must make the way across a maze of beams.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth from the boats to get as many flags. Contestant is put into a vat used for stomping on grapes to make wine. Contestant must walk the length of the truck removing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform. One at a time, contestants pick gifts from under a Christmas tree. Contestants must swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot Plexiglas grid that is lit on fire.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be contected to a dune buggy by his ankles. Contestant will have to bury their spouse's head in worms using only their mouth. One person from each team will be hanging from the skids of a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be chained to either side of a platform with the contestant having one key to free them from chains. Player dunks their head into a tank and retrieves a cows heart with their mouth.

programme.title: Young Ip Man
programme.desc: In 1917 young Ip Man first came to Hong Kong to study, but his peaceful campus life was unexpectedly broken. A shocking hostage situation occurred on the day when the school held an English speech contest.

programme.title: Ip Man: Awakening

programme.title: Ip Man

programme.title: Ip Man 2

programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Bruce Lee faces an underground criminal element after members of his family begin disappearing. Now he must break his vow of non-violence to take on the terrifying "Big Boss.

programme.title: Fist of Fury

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita el bistró francés Hannah and Mason's. El restaurante, propiedad de dos amigos que carecen de habilidades comerciales y motivación, no puede cubrir la nomina al personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Sabatiello's y encuentra a un propietario impetuoso que está muy endeudado.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Black Pearl, un restaurante de mariscos que tiene tres propietarios, cada uno de los cuales dirige la cocina de manera diferente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Indiana, J. Willy's Bar and Grille está muy endeudado.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por Café 36, un restaurante franco-estadounidense en Illinois.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Macomb Township, Michigan, para inspeccionar Giuseppe's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay llega a Jack's Waterfront y está horrorizado por la falta de mariscos frescos y la falta de atención de la gerencia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a Los Ángeles para inspeccionar Sante La Brea. Descubre a un propietario con problemas financieros que no es respetado por su personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Cuando el Chef Ramsay regresa a Finn McCool's, The Olde Stone Mill, The Mixing Bowl, Dillon's, Campania's y Peter's, encuentra restaurantes salvados del borde del desastre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik seemingly announces his surrender to Sonic, and he invites him to a resort in his gratitude. Unbeknownst to Sonic, the resort is just another trap created by Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Brandon Quark try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley and warns Sonic, and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pursues Breezie and Robotnik Jr. in order to find out why they betrayed him with the intent of building a perpetually loyal robot wife. In a subplot, Junior is in love with Breezie, and enlists Sonic's help in wooing her.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On Sonic's birthday, Tails builds a flying bicycle. Realizing Tails' potential with mechanics, Professor Von Schlemmer invites Tails to be his research assistant.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An intergalactic huntress captures various citizens of Mobius and falls in love with Robotnik during her visit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik unleashes his "Stupidity Ray"on Mobius. As Sonic and Tails make their way to Robotnik's new lair, the Pinball Fortress they find themselves competing with Wes Weasely and Sergeant Doberman.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik threatens to demolish an airport, a lighthouse, and a train station. Sonic is forced to travel to all three places in order to remove the bombs.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik uses his Robo-Matic Machine to construct a pushy robot coach from a football called Coachnik by placing playbooks, game films, strategies, plenty of grit, nerves of steel , and a 300 lb. ham into the Robo-Matic Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic comes to the rescue of a town that is held for ransom by Robotnik's crime syndicate. A few scenes from the pilot animation are integrated into this episode.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A chemical accident caused by Coconuts ends up giving superpowers to Robotnik, who quickly uses them to threaten Mobius's world leaders and publicly humiliate Sonic. However, Robotnik isn't completely invincible.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An asteroid is heading for Turtle Town and Robotnik offers to save it, but only if Sonic agrees to play in the Robolympics against him and his robots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic becomes the sheriff of Tranquil Gulch, in hopes of keeping Robotnik's robots from harassing the locals.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik goes time-traveling to find four Chaos Emeralds that could make him all-powerful. His first stop is the time of Blackbeard the Pirate, where he enlists the pirate's help to find the Emerald of Invisibility.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's next stop in his time-travel is the time of King Arfur and the Knights of the Round Table to get the Emerald of Invincibility. Sonic follows him, but Robotnik, with the unwilling help of local wizard Merlynx, obtains the Emerald.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In his next time-travel stop, Robotnik is erasing Sonic's family tree in order to get the Chaos Emerald of Immortality. Sonic goes after him, prevent Robotnik from interfering with his ancestors.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Despite the intervention of Sonic and Tails, Robotnik obtains the Chaos Emerald of life in prehistory and the other emeralds and becomes the Supreme High Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails babysit a trio of unruly baby beavers who end up being abducted by Scratch and Grounder. Robotnik uses the beavers as bait to capture Sonic and Tails, but the beavers become resourceful and help their friends thwart Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails and a group of miners are hit by Robotnik's shrink ray and must work together to undo the effects.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: For this episode's challenge, all of the chefs roll a twelve-sided dice to determine their ingredients. Each team produces one dish using all the ingredients named.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams submit to the annual blind taste test challenge. The winners spend a day at a water park while the losers make deliveries, grind peppercorn, change the oil in the fryers and peel potatoes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The two teams must prepare three dishes from the regular Hell's Kitchen menu in a tag-team race. Chef Ramsay judges the dishes on completeness, appearance and taste.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is the beautiful bride and Mork is the outrageously funny groom - who may not be able to fit into his tuxedo if he can't convince Orson to approve the marriage and undo his transformation of Mork into an English sheep dog.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne tries to restore her new boyfriend’s self-confidence after he fails to stand up to some tough guys.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne swings into action when she believes the man she's been dating—a former trapeze artist—is out to kill her.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne pretends to be a woman with-child in order to help her pregnant friend win prizes in a contest for mothers-to-be.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: While checking up on her new photographer boyfriend at a fashion show, Laverne creates chaos when she is mistaken for a model.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and the gang fearfully gather in an attempt to rid Laverne's apartment of an odd ghost that has suddenly taken up residence.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Lenny and Squiggy set off on a frantic search for their fortune when they find a treasure map.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Carmine is a national sensation when he performs a song and dance routine, supposedly laced with wicked messages on television.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls go on a disastrous double-blind date.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is dazed at the reality that she and Mork are the parents of Mearth -half-earthling/half-orkan with the body of a 50-year-old and the mind of an infant and feels lef t out when Mearth accepts Mork as his mommy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork buys Mearth a fortune in presents to assure his happiness, and when Mindy, fearing a spoiled child, orders that they be returned, their unusual child decides they don't love him anymore.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy, already worried about losing her job at the television station, foresees disaster when Mork and Mearth accidentally transfer minds, forcing her to take Mearth in Mork’s body to meet the new boss.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Terror-stricken Mork believes the examiner assigned to give him a driving test is an incarnation of the devil, and careens along the test course in a spectacular tilted wheelie, with Mindy and Mearth in the car.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All of Mork's Earth memory is zapped into thin air by vengeful Orson on Ork when Mork neglects his job of reporting back to his planet because of family responsibilities.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou plans a weekend alone with Scott while the rest of the crew goes on a cattle drive. But Lou's plans hit a snafu when the first customers of the dude ranch show up a week early.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou takes three of her former New York co-workers on the Heartland Equine Retreat. Ashley Stanton gets set up with a training partner and horse. Mallory takes Spartan out for a ride.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy tries to help a horse who's become skittish around water after his constable rescues a 15-year-old from drowning.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: It's rodeo time. Amy decides to try team roping with Caleb until he has second thoughts. Meanwhile, Lou loses her Queen of the Rodeo contestant, Soroya.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: During a late summer heatwave, Ty's dad shows up with a truck full of sick, thirsty horses bound for the slaughterhouse. Amy recognizes one of the horses and the mystery deepens.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Much to her mother's dismay, Ashley is staying at Heartland and has promoted herself to VP of guest relations. Ty is still trying to make amends with Amy for his latest relationship snafu.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's patience is tried as Tim recovers from his shooting injury at Heartland. Amy uncovers some surprises about an ex-owner of a horse she's hoping to re-home.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hollywood starlet Mindy Fanshaw arrives at Heartland under the pretext of honing her non-existent riding skills in anticipation of an upcoming role.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa meddles in Lou's business and personal life with disastrous results. Mackenzie comes back to Heartland to get married, but when a cursed horse also arrives, the wedding is almost called off.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An oil company begins unwanted exploration on Heartland property, so Lou mobilizes the community against them.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hoping that Heartland will have a therapeutic effect on two tough kids on probation, Clint Riley books into the dude ranch for a weekend of team building and discipline.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Kit asks Ty to help her re-home a horse that she was given. Lou resurrects the Hudson Derby as a fundraiser event to help Mrs. Bell and others with some county legal problems.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Spartan is stolen and turns up at a horse auction. He is bought by Wes, the man who tried to burn down Fleming's barn. Amy is determined to get Spartan back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After a traumatized Spartan refuses to jump, Amy takes him to a man who fixes horses and hearts. Meanwhile, Ty struggles to tame his new horse, Harley, on his own.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A sibling rivalry in the Seaver household causes Ben to solicit money from the neighbors.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike is accused of cheating after getting the highest grade in class and must convince others he's innocent.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Thanks to their children, Jason and Maggie spend a whole day together for their anniversary.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason works to save Maggie's family home from sale, as Mike tries to rescue the Seaver house from destruction.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Maggie and Jason face career decisions that could affect each other, as Mike makes a philosophical discovery.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After his Uncle Bob dies, Mike is haunted by nightmares of Bob.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason feels old and becomes depressed, Maggie finds the cure - a reunion with his old band.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The first day back at school proves very educational for the family, as Ben learns to face fear.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol's friend Annie uses Carol to win Mike's affection.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben passes out a pornographic telephone number at school, he blames it on his best friend.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike becomes Employee of the Month and his parents buy him a car, but soon he must tell them he's been fired.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Carol does her best to alter her saintly reputation, Mike gets physical to protect his sister's honor.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike tricks his brother and sister again, the whole family decides to get even with a con of their own.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie get into an argument over a mandatory dress code in the schools.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben invites a runaway kid home for Christmas, the Seavers learn about charity and the value of family.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After being caught in a lie, Maggie grounds herself to teach Mike a lesson despite an impending Sinatra show.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol is given the chance to skip a grade in school, while Mike looks forward to a date with an older woman.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The teacher's student assistant changes Mike's grade to an A so she can be his date on a ski trip.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: It's time for the Spring Formal, and Mike has his hands full, as three different girls want to go with him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol has a slumber party, Ben and Mike can't resist scaring her friends.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Maggie and Jason spend the evening at home, Mike faces peer pressure and questions whether to use drugs.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ben becomes interested in girls but doesn't understand them. He learns Mike and Jason are still learning, too.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie say "no" to a nose job, but Carol seems determined - until Mike makes a startling admission.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie immerses herself in a school carnival, Ben feels ignored, and Jason almost drowns.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben researches his family's history, he finds evidence his mother and father have both been divorced.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The experiences of a distraught, expectant father teach Mike the value of an education.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: It's Chore Day at the Seaver house, and Ben attempts to record the day's events for a school project.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie gets a job offer from a newspaper editor with ulterior motives, Jason faces an ethical dilemma.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part episode, Jason faces a potential mutiny from his unhappy family on vacation.

programme.title: Lonestar Christmas
programme.desc: Erin takes her daughters to spend Christmas with her estranged dad on his Texas ranch, where she unexpectedly falls in love with local restaurateur Mateo while learning to forgive her father for the past.

programme.title: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: A woman hopes to impress her new boss and the cute guy in her cubicle, but she is forced to wear an ugly Christmas sweater that she got from her eccentric grandmother.

programme.title: Writing Around the Christmas Tree
programme.desc: A romance novelist meets a dashing author at a holiday writer's retreat who convinces her that to write about love, she must, first, experience it.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Every December in the small town of Ponchatoula, La., a wooden wishing box is placed in the park as a Christmas tradition. People write down their true heart's desire on a slip of paper and place it in the box.

programme.title: A Family for the Holidays
programme.desc: Ian plans what he thinks is the perfect marriage proposal at a bucolic Vermont inn, but things do not go as planned.

programme.title: My Favorite Christmas Melody
programme.desc: Once a promising singer-songwriter, Abby now finds herself writing uninspired jingles for commercials. As she heads home for the holidays, Abby soon rediscovers her voice as a local music teacher enlists her to help save a school arts program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Dimitrius goes under cover as his wife has unexpected news.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Bobby goes undercover as an Elvis impersonator; Sue learns about Troy's estranged brother.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: A man is suspected of gunning down his co-workers.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: While bungee-jumping, a couple discover a corpse at the bottom of a gorge; the lab goes into lockdown when an unknown substance begins oozing from the cadaver.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The body of a pregnant 16-year-old athlete found buried in a mound of salt in a city de-icing truck leads Booth and Brennan to the discovery that many of her teammates are pregnant or have babies after a pregnancy pact.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan are convinced the death was no accident after the half-eaten body of Cam's ex is found in the tiger cage at the zoo, leading the team to hypnotize one suspect (Chad Lowe) to try to jog his memory.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate when pulverized human remains are found in a garbage bag; Angela's father (Billy F. Gibbons) seeks revenge on Hodgins.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An openly gay Navy lieutenant set to receive the Medal of Honor is murdered; Palmer gets ready for fatherhood.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A murdered Marine and alumnus of the military academy DiNozzo attended is found with a student's photograph in his hand; Bishop and her husband ask Gibbs and the team to dinner.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When an explosion rocks a summit on global terror, the team suspects Gibbs' archenemy is responsible; Gibbs tries to help Fornell after his wife's murder.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to have been living under an alias created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases from 20 years ago.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the world of black market art when evidence in a murder case reveals that a rare painting has been swapped for a fake.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a dead thief is found in a Marine's home, the NCIS team finds the calling card of a terror group the Department of Defense had been tracking.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer's murder results in a lead in a 40-year-old airport bombing case; McGee is upset that he was not briefed on the cold case.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The Flash Challenge gets explosive when the artists paint with fire, the artists design Neptune tattoos, and veteran tattoo artist Justin Weatherholtz joins as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists must paint custom designs for muscle cars, a morphing anatomical heart tattoo keeps the artists on their toes, and tattoo artist Rose Hardy is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Virgin canvases sit for fingernail tattoos, the artists replicate fine art masterpieces in the Elimination Tattoo, and museum curator Carter Foster is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The contestants join forces with inspiring guest artists in the Flash Challenge, and a throat placement Elimination Tattoo throws the artists off of their games.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists test their technical application with realistic football designs in the Flash Challenge, and professional football players call the shots in the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists are tasked with designing art using nails, and military personnel brings their loved ones as they sit for portraits in a high-pressure Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The remaining four artists must survive a tattoo marathon, and the contestants are given the chance to redo their previously botched tattoos to secure a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Eliminated artists return to confront one another, and for the first time ever, the final three artists tattoo live for $100,000 and the title of Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The battle for $100,000 and the title of Ink Master begins as new artists are thrown into the fire in an intense Flash Challenge, and the first veteran artist returns.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Egos collide when the artists are forced to get their hands dirty in a team Flash Challenge, and another veteran artist returns to clean up the competition.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Creativity is tested in a salty Flash Challenge, the artists transform their canvases into comic-book characters, and another veteran artist returns.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Forensics expert Adrian Gardner assesses the artists' fingerprint tattoos in the Flash Challenge, and a veteran artist's return sparks old rivalries.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists team up to transform contortionists using body paint, and a veteran artist returns to add a new-school twist to an old subject.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: New alliances are formed during a high-pressure Flash Challenge, and a veteran artist joins forces with the new artists in an effort to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un oficial de la policía estatal muere de varios disparos después de detener una camioneta por una infracción de tránsito.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Una profesora en Washington D. C. es asesinada de disparos mientras intentaba subirse a su auto, y su cuerpo queda en el estacionamiento mientras el homicida escapa con él.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: La mañana del 23 de noviembre de 1987, prisioneros de nacionalidad cubana en la Prisión Federal de Atlanta comenzaron a provocar incendios al detonar armas caseras, y robaron esposas y radios de los empleados de la prisión.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la primavera de 1997, un asesino cuyas presas eran personas mayores, aterrorizó a los habitantes de River Parish en el sur de Luisiana.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 12 de diciembre de 1998, dos personas armadas secuestraron a 3 bedeles que iban a hacer la limpieza en el almacén de cajeros automáticos de un banco en Las Vegas y los mantuvieron de rehenes después de ingresar a la instalación.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Henderson, un suburbio de Las Vegas, dos ladrones que portaban rifles de asalto emboscaron y asesinaron a dos guardias armados mientras salían con un camión en marzo de 2000 y robaron miles de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 12 de febrero de 1997, dos hombres usaron una almádena para entrar en una casa de Camden, Nueva Jersey, y uno de los intrusos resultó herido cuando el propietario les disparó mientras intentaban escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando los criminales violentos atacan, el FBI contraataca: emplea cada recurso disponible y, de ser necesario, crea otros.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En los años setenta, el Otpor, un ala violenta de la Resistencia Nacional Croata, cometió actos terroristas en contra de los que no apoyaban el movimiento en los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una serie de robos e invasiones de propiedad tuvieron lugar en el área de Detroit. Los ladrones resultaron ser parte de una banda local apodada “Los invasores de casas”, cuyos crímenes abarcaban fraudes al seguro, robo, y operaciones ilegales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Esta es la historia de la primera captura del FBI de un terrorista internacional libanés. En junio de 1985, el terrorista y sus cuatro cómplices secuestraron el avión de una aerolínea poco después de despegar de Beirut.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de la década de los setenta, el FBI tuvo conocimiento de que había terroristas anticastristas operando en los Estados Unidos. Pero entonces apareció un nuevo grupo, más violento y agresivo que sus predecesores.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años setenta y principios de los ochenta, un grupo terrorista conocido como las FALN es considerado sospechoso de colocar bombas en ciudades importantes de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Filadelfia, una lucha despiadada para hacerse con el poder condujo a una guerra de la mafia a gran escala. La familia del crimen de la mafia local se dividió en dos mientras los jóvenes y los mayores se enfrentaban a muerte.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's anonymous letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie -- at least for now. Meanwhile, Mike, Vinny, and Pauly (MVP) have their hands full juggling four girls in one night.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. After spending another night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little-known fact about her pinkeye-prone cuddle-buddy.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the fallout from the girl-fight; Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; and Jenni and Snooki don homemade hazmat suits to clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to the Jose. Vinny's family comes to visit. And Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of their hearts will be broken.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns she slept with Jose after smushing Vin. Then she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. But it's the last straw when Mike discovers more unpleasantness in the bathroom.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. And Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels about them, sending Snooki into a frenzy and finally pushing things over the edge.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Vinny decides between two sets of girls. And with Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam. But Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mike becomes increasingly belligerent with her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike for being off his game - he gets the roommates kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, practically burns down the house, and proves to be a failure as a wingman for Pauly. Twice!

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Pauly and Vin each have a final date with their Miami girls, while Sam and Ron's last supper quickly devolves into a fight. Then Jenni stirs things up between Pauly and Mike, leading to a drama-filled final night in the hot tub.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The cast of the Jersey Shore are back together to dish the dirt on Miami. From bromance and romance to the infamous note and the fights that followed, the cast tells all.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki brings her friend Deena to the Shore for the summer. The tension between the girls from Miami finally explodes as fists and extensions go flying on their first night in the house.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The fight between Sammi and Jwoww causes tension in the house. Ronnie and Sammi continue to isolate themselves. When Ronnie finally decides to hang out and have fun with the rest of the house, Sammi feels all alone.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. Jwoww runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. And Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed until she meets a new guy. Deena meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, Jwoww's relationship with Tom comes to an end.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Johnnie says she suspects Henri of cheating now because he acts indifferent and doesn’t come home most nights. Henri points the finger back claiming Johnnie's not only a cheater, but also enables her family members and has developed a gambling habit.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: The road has been rocky for Autumn and Maya. Autumn has stood by Maya, but is fed up with the constant cheating and lies. Will this couple say "I Do" or "I Don't" to a committed relationship?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Despite their age gap, Tamara and Jasmine have been together for 10 years. Tamara claims Jasmine sends risque texts to other people. Jasmine claims Tamara explodes in fits of rage. Can this couple get over their age gap?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Trisi is furious with Clyde's behavior within their marriage. She says Clyde will spend most of the day on the phone with his female friend. Clyde says his wife is jealous and there is nothing going on.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Brian says his wife, Tierra, has been trying to get revenge by not wanting to have sex and engaging in inappropriate conversations with other men. Tierra says she's tired of the problems and admits marrying Brian may not have been the best decision.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: After 21 years together, LaSonya claims her husband still can’t keep his pants zipped and quit the flirting. Daniea Lanier says he is fed up with her attitude and feels she would be happier if she had more self-esteem.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Bruce is fed up with Rashad not wearing his engagement right and is questioning whether or not Rashad wants to get married.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Alyssia says Devonte is a serial cheater, but wants to save their relationship. He says she's insecure and stalks his social media. They share a child, but Devonte doesn't want to commit if she won't change. Can Judge Toler help them?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Markia says Herb's overactive sex drive is ruining their relationship because he wants it daily. When Herb doesn't get his way, he throws major tantrums. Can Herb learn to take breathers or has this 11 year relationship taking its toll?

programme.desc: Latasha says Bryan has been living a double life and has ruined any change of them having a future together.
